textByHash.076598d23bf0e80d5158b9301828e351526cb58c: And I have orders from the Sergeant to stay here.
textByHash.2fba9623d5f0519856c47299a94260a85e2afa3e: We were on our way to decommission Glough's old ship building facilities in eastern Karamja, as you probably know. However, we obviously chose the wrong season to fly.
textByHash.464618d936e90aa27f0305f59570f142dcf83345: We spent time gathering enough wood to fashion two boats. The Sergeant took the rest of the 10th squad in the larger of the boats to explore the island and to search for potential glider launch sites.
textByHash.5fb7ab740b8d5231f9a116d49f8168b7c7273c81: I am under direct orders to remain here.
textByHash.690c9ec8c1fdafa5827a3b7fd8329adb48202559: I will not take orders from you.
textByHash.71932628713b4c0cbd11b2ce7be54b5396734a56: I might be. Do you have any way to prove that you are who you say are?
textByHash.726d7166768b30e8064383873ee4d8220b38d157: Whilst we were falling, Sergeant Garkor noticed a large populated atoll to our west. You cannot see it from here, but it is within sailing distance.
textByHash.93c84ab275dd039ec3cebfb13ecc1d56fc52cc1b: Let me begin at the beginning, human.
textByHash.a0facd365b78e977ebb69a6a5f96aa27ed826b84: Yes. The winds drove us into the treetops, which destroyed the canvas of our gliders. We dragged what remained of the gliders out onto this beach.
textByHash.b4a41bbff2391eaf93fc828c09c042ef9a5a2cca: I suppose it is. Sorry for my distrust.
textByHash.cc77424440713da9fbb445965cf78c2d388575f1: I see. Sorry for my distrust.
textByHash.d197744224c4ba14498fded80e0396ae2a72a335: What business do you have here?
textByHash.dfa3dc9845274734892c556d0dfd969a3180eff0: We were one gnome to a glider, so each was extremely light. Like leaves in a wind, we were blown south before we even landed on that island.
